---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Problem**
What are you trying to do that CodeSight doesn't support yet?

**Proposed solution**
How should it work? CLI flags, output format, behavior changes, etc.

**Alternatives considered**
Any workarounds you've tried or other tools that handle this.

**Context**
Anything else — screenshots, links, related issues.
